main.description: Propose a deployment plan: BoM (UNSPSC code list + qty + estimated USDC cost), target topology (FK ↔ open-* CIM record DIDs), timeline, and fleet allocation. BoM / cost / supplier identities are XChaCha20-Poly1305-enveloped per ADR-2605181100 (envelope payload only; this lexicon describes the public envelope shape). Triggers governance vote when proportionality-check DMN flags requiresGovernance=true.

targetTopologyDids.description: DIDs of open-* utility records this plan will create (open-denki / open-gas / open-water / open-network / open-power / etc.)

bomEnvelopeCid.description: IPFS CID of the XChaCha20-Poly1305 envelope containing the BoM (UNSPSC commodity codes + qty + estimated USDC cost + supplier DIDs). Recipients: Council Lv6+ (3+) + plan steward + assigned construction-cell leader.

robotCount.description: Number of Giemon units required (Otete arms + crawlers + Hitogata humanoid + future Quad)

paymentPlanCid.description: IPFS CID of payment schedule (Etzhayyim.pay() calls with TitheRouter 90/10 split). Encrypted same as bomEnvelope.

requiresGovernance.description: From proportionality-check DMN — when true, plan acceptance blocked on governance vote

governanceProposalUri.description: URI of the governance proposal record (when requiresGovernance=true)

councilThirdPartyReviewCid.description: Required when ecologyImpactScore > 30: ecologist third-party review IPFS CID
